# www.vald.com llms.txt

> Focused on advancing the musculoskeletal industry, this site offers technology solutions, case studies, and educational resources for healthcare providers and performance professionals.

- [VALD Technology Promotion](https://www.vald.com/): Promote VALD technology for the musculoskeletal industry and connect with professionals and organizations.
- [Careers at VALD](https://www.vald.com/careers): Recruitment and showcasing company values for potential employees.
- [VALD Privacy Policy](https://www.vald.com/privacy-policy): To outline how VALD Pty Ltd collects, uses, and protects personal information under applicable privacy laws.
- [Contact VALD](https://www.vald.com/contact): Provide contact information and support for VALD's products and services.
- [VALDCON Convention Promotion](https://www.vald.com/valdcon): Promote participation in VALDCON, an annual global convention organized by VALD.
